title: Festive Freeze-Garlic
description: A halal-friendly Uruguayan dish featuring a fermented and gooey mix of frozen seafood seasoned with garlic for a festive touch.

ingredients.name: Sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: For extra crunch and festive look

instructions: Place the mixed seafood in a bowl, sprinkle with crushed garlic, chopped herbs, and sesame seeds.
Gently toss until all ingredients are evenly distributed. Refrigerate for at least 24 hours to allow fermentation.
Freeze the mixture in an ice cube tray overnight or for several days.
When ready to serve, thaw cubes slightly before placing them on a grill over medium heat.
Flip and season with salt as desired.
